title: Cobblemon May's Bracelet Fix
description: Fixes off-hand display and provides a new high-quality model for May's Bracelet.
body:
### Features / Changelog:
* **Fix:** Resolved the incorrect display of May's Bracelet when equipped in the off-hand slot.
* **Remodel:** Completely re-modeled and polished the bracelet for a more aesthetic and high-quality look in-game.
* **Compatibility:** Designed specifically for the Cobblemon: Mega Showdown mod.
